text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew... This atmosphere is really something else...
It's like everyone's on edge.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wonder if Sei's feels the same way.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They say that the Umamusume who takes the
Kikuka Sho is the best around, right?
choice_data_list:
We have to win it if you're going to become the
best in Japan.

best in Japan.
